description:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP]**

Per FRAC-21 §C1, §C2, §C5: accessibility gaps across the hero search, octahedron nav, and muted-text contrast.

## Three sub-issues

### A. Hero search semantics
`src/components/sections/Hero.tsx:103,135-149` renders the result dropdown as `<li role="option">` with mouse handlers, without a combobox/listbox relationship to the input. Pointer users get the dropdown; keyboard + screen-reader users don't get the full affordance.

**Fix:** wire proper combobox semantics — `<input role="combobox" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-expanded aria-controls="..." aria-activedescendant>`, `<ul role="listbox" id="...">`, options with `role="option" id="..."` and `aria-selected`. Keyboard arrow navigation; Enter to select; Escape to close.

### B. Octahedron keyboard nav
`src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx:715-730,737-753` — tooltips are clickable `<div>`s; meshes are pointer-only hit targets. The hero nav is not keyboard accessible.

**Fix:** expose an accessible parallel — either (a) a visually-hidden but focusable list of nav-node links keyboard users can Tab through, (b) keyboard handlers on the `<Html>` tooltips (`<button>` instead of `<div>`, focusable via Tab), or (c) both.

### C. Muted-text contrast
`--muted-foreground: 0 0% 40%` (≈ `#666`) on `#f8f6f0` cream lands at ~4.0:1 — below WCAG AA 4.5:1 for normal text. The body noise SVG erodes it further. `Hero.tsx:114` search placeholder uses `text-foreground/40` ≈ 2:1, fails AA.

**Fix:** either raise `--muted-foreground` to ~`0 0% 32%` (≈ 5:1 on cream — verify), OR scope `text-foreground/80`-`/40` opacity utilities to large/heading text only (where AA Large 3:1 applies). Hero placeholder needs at least `/60` for AA Large.

## Acceptance criteria

- Hero search: combobox semantics; keyboard navigable; screen-reader announces results
- Octahedron: keyboard nav for the 5 visible houses
- Muted-foreground passes WCAG AA 4.5:1 on cream surface (verified with axe-core or a contrast tool)
- Hero search placeholder passes WCAG AA Large 3:1 minimum

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §C1, §C2, §C5
title: [Cleanup] A11y pass: hero search combobox/listbox semantics, octahedron keyboard nav, muted-text contrast on cream
